selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining immediate contradiction packet on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the directed-extraction question-and-answer family into controller-facing contradiction and policy fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next math-class fence once the contradiction packet is isolated.
Strongest paired follow-on after the engine-contract fence.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the six policy seams, answer-version deltas, and ambiguity discipline tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: DIRECTED_EXTRACTION_AFTER_BROAD_SWEEP_SATURATION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the family’s audit conclusion into a controller rule for switching from broad extraction to targeted questions.

candidate_items.name: ANSWER_VARIANT_DELTA_IS_SIGNAL_NOT_NOISE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves divergence across the two answer sheets as a controller instability signal.

candidate_items.name: ZIP_TRANSPORT_CORE_STABLE_VARIANT_EDGES_QUARANTINED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the shared ZIP transport core while quarantining proposal-side and variant extras.

candidate_items.name: FULL_PLUS_AND_FULL_PLUS_PLUS_CONFIRMATION_REMAIN_UNSETTLED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the save-confirmation contradiction cluster into a controller nonsettlement fence.

candidate_items.name: QUALITATIVE_GUIDANCE_WITHOUT_FALSE_NUMERIC_LOCK
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves batch-scale, sharding, and phase-transition guidance without overpromoting concrete-looking markers.

quarantined_items.name: ROSETTA_OVERLAY_ZIP_AS_ESTABLISHED_TRANSPORT_TYPE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent preserves overlay ZIP naming as proposal-side variant residue rather than settled transport law.

quarantined_items.name: STRONGER_CONFIRMATION_CLAIMS_AS_SETTLED_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly preserves unresolved FULL+ and FULL++ confirmation semantics across answer variants.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier ten controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the eleventh bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
